requirements.desc: R1: ステップ順序変更 commit(+retro+report)→merge→sync→cleanup
requirements.note: STEP_MAP is now {1:commit, 2:merge, 3:sync, 4:cleanup}. retro and report run as post-commit operations within step 1. Pipeline order matches spec.

requirements.desc: R2: 関数呼び出し化 merge/retro/report
requirements.note: finalize.js now imports merge.js main() and retro.js execute() directly instead of runSync. report uses imported generateReport/saveReport. No subprocess spawning for these three.

requirements.desc: R3: ctx にパス情報追加 worktreePath/mainRepoPath
requirements.note: resolveWorktreePaths called once at line ~122, both worktreePath and mainRepoPath destructured and passed to merge main() and executeCleanup().

requirements.desc: R4: cleanup 統合 finalize.jsに統合
requirements.note: cleanup.js deleted from src/flow/commands/. executeCleanup() function inlined in finalize.js handling spec-only, worktree, and branch modes. clearFlowState called directly.
runIfDirect import removed, CLI arg parsing removed, shebang removed. main(ctx) accepts ctx object and is exported. No more standalone execution support.
src/flow/run/report.js created with execute(ctx). registry.js updated with flow.run.report entry pointing to it.
SKILL.md updated with 4-step description (commit+retro+report, merge, sync, cleanup). Old 6-step references replaced. Step numbers updated throughout.

requirements.desc: R8: 画面表示 report+sync結果
requirements.note: finalize.js outputs results JSON to stdout via output(). results object contains report data and sync diffStat/diffSummary. SKILL.md instructs displaying sync.diffSummary. Sync skip status included when PR route.

unplanned.change: Deleted cleanup.test.js — expected consequence of R4 (cleanup.js removal) but not explicitly listed as a requirement
Deleted merge.test.js and merge-pr.test.js — tests relied on CLI entrypoint (--dry-run) which was removed by R5. No replacement tests for the new function-call interface
Relaxed regex from /unknown action/i to /unknown (action|key)/i — adapts to changed error message format
Spec artifacts (draft.md, flow.json, qa.md, review.md, spec.md, tests/) added — standard SDD flow output, not a code change

summary.notes: All 8 requirements are fully satisfied. The diff cleanly implements the finalize pipeline redesign: step reordering, function call migration, ctx path injection, cleanup inlining, merge.js simplification, report registry registration, SKILL.md update, and combined result output. The deleted test files for merge and cleanup are a natural consequence of removing CLI entrypoints but represent a test coverage gap for the new function-call interface — the spec tests partially cover this via static analysis but not runtime behavior.
